      "title": "2026 a growth Budget for Sri Lanka? | Daily FT",
      "content": "After a remarkable recovery from a very deep crisis in 2022, Sri Lanka’s recent Budget consolidates economic stablisation and introduces a few markers for further growth (e.g. on trade, digitalisation and the Port City), but more needs to be done to embed a growth strategy and transform its economy to avoid further IMF austerity programs. ***This is a Budget that does not harm Sri Lanka’s upward growth trajectory but may do some good in terms of supporting growth through FTAs, digitisation and attracting FDI into the Colombo Port City.
